goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'kings lynn' and should 'arrive by 13:30'.
The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
